description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' section to browse available tasks.
frame_description: Explore page showing a horizontal list of 'Short tasks & surveys' and a vertical list of 'Sessions to schedule'.

description: User scrolls vertically down the Explore page to view more session opportunities.
frame_description: The Explore page is scrolled down, revealing more session cards like 'Diary Study' and 'AI Interview'.

description: User scrolls vertically back up to the top of the Explore page.
frame_description: The Explore page is scrolled back to the top, returning to the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' section again, examining different task cards.
frame_description: The user is browsing the horizontal list of tasks at the top of the Explore page.

description: Cursor hovers over the filter icon in the top right corner of the screen.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the filter icon at the top right of the Explore page.

description: User clicks the filter icon to open the filter options.
frame_description: The filter icon is activated by a click.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears, sliding up from the bottom of the screen.
frame_description: A modal overlay titled 'Filter Opportunities' appears over the Explore page.

description: User scrolls vertically through the filter options within the modal.
frame_description: The user is scrolling through various filter categories like Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate inside the modal.

description: User clicks the 'X' close button to dismiss the filter modal.
frame_description: The close button in the top right of the filter modal is clicked.

description: The filter modal closes, returning the user to the Explore page.
frame_description: The filter modal disappears, revealing the Explore page again.

description: User scrolls vertically down the Explore page.
frame_description: The user is scrolling down the main content area of the Explore page.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' section for an extended period.
frame_description: The user is slowly swiping through the horizontal list of task cards at the top of the page.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'AI Interview' task card in the horizontal list.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'AI Interview' card within the horizontal task list.
